title: ta'ar #8388
definition:
1) (Qal) to be drawn, incline, delineate, extend
    1a) meaning dubious
 2) (Piel) to draw in outline, trace out
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) (Qal) to be drawn, incline, delineate, extend
    1a) meaning dubious
 2) (Piel) to draw in outline, trace out

    NASB:  prob. to incline
